title: T-001 — Migration: items table (universal item master)
prompt: Create Drizzle migration adding the universal item master table per 03-TECHNICAL-PRD §5.1 and §6.1. Table `items` with columns: id UUID PK default gen_random_uuid(), org_id UUID NOT NULL FK organizations(id), item_code TEXT NOT NULL, item_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK in ('rm','intermediate','fg','co_product','byproduct'), name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK in ('draft','active','deprecated','blocked'), product_group TEXT, uom_base TEXT NOT NULL, uom_secondary TEXT, gs1_gtin TEXT, weight_mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fixed' CHECK in ('fixed','catch'), nominal_weight NUMERIC(10,4), tare_weight NUMERIC(10,4), gross_weight_max NUMERIC(10,4), variance_tolerance_pct NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 5.0, shelf_life_days INT, shelf_life_mode TEXT DEFAULT 'use_by' CHECK in ('use_by','best_before'), date_code_format TEXT, cost_per_kg NUMERIC(10,4), d365_item_id TEXT, d365_last_sync_at TIMESTAMPTZ, d365_sync_status TEXT DEFAULT 'unsynced', ext_jsonb JSONB DEFAULT '{}', private_jsonb JSONB DEFAULT '{}', schema_version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, created_by UUID FK users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), UNIQUE(org_id,item_code). Indexes idx_items_org_type (org_id,item_type,status), idx_items_d365 partial WHERE d365_item_id IS NOT NULL, idx_items_ext_jsonb GIN(ext_jsonb). Enable RLS with policy USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid). RED: a vitest+pg-mem (or testcontainers) test asserts table exists with all columns, constraints, indexes and that RLS policy is enabled. Run: `pnpm vitest run db/migrations/items`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle migration: items master table with RLS, indexes, item_type+status enums.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use Drizzle migration in db/migrations. Follow pattern of existing organizations/users tables. CHECK constraints expressed as Postgres CHECK clauses. RLS policy named `items_org_isolation` on the table. uom_base accepted values informational (kg|g|l|ml|pcs) — store as TEXT (no enum lock yet). gs1_gtin nullable. Coordinate with 02-SETTINGS reference_schemas — schema_version field reserved for future ext_jsonb shape evolution. Do NOT seed any rows in this task.
acceptance_criteria: Given a clean test database, when the migration runs, then table `items` exists with all 23 columns and enums per §5.1.
Given table `items` exists, when querying pg_indexes, then idx_items_org_type, idx_items_d365 (partial), idx_items_ext_jsonb (GIN) are present.
Given RLS is enabled on items, when SELECT runs without app.current_org_id, then no rows are visible.
Given the migration file, when re-applied, then it is idempotent (no duplicate-table error).
test_strategy: Add failing RED test in tests/db/items.migration.test.ts before writing migration.
risk_red_lines: Do not modify organizations or users tables.
Do not seed any item rows here.
Do not introduce hard FK to D365 — d365_item_id is a soft reference (TEXT).
